Browser Extension

webpage.

Click the toolbar icon and the entire page becomes editable — like a Word doc, right in your browser.

Download for Chrome

Free forever  ·  No account needed  ·  Open source

Installation & Usage

Get started in minutes

01 📥

Download

Download the file for your browser above — Chrome/Chromium or Firefox. Alternatively grab it from mazebeamtech.github.io/MazeEdit.

02 ⚙️

Install

For Chromium: enable Developer Mode in the extensions page, then upload the zip. For Firefox: go to about:config, search xpinstall.signatures.required and toggle it to false.

03 📌

Pin & Use

Pin the extension to your toolbar and click to enable. Your webpage instantly turns into an editable document. Enjoy!

How it works

Three steps, zero friction

01 📥

Install

Download and add to your browser in seconds. No account, no signup.

02 ✏️

Click the icon

Hit the pencil in your toolbar. The whole page instantly becomes editable.

03 🖊️

Just type

Click anywhere and start editing. Delete, retype, paste — works like a doc.
